flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California Institute of Integral Studies rose 42% between 2007 and 2010 ($13.2k → $18.8k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at California Institute of Integral Studies are 13% below 6-year earnings ($56.4k → $48.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at California Institute of Integral Studies rose 62% between 2007 and 2010 (56 → 91).
